7eea2479354dd6bcc084158c6f82b57d.name: Creator Campaign Analytics Platform
description: Built a cloud-based analytics platform that aggregates creator engagement metrics from YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok APIs into a centralized PostgreSQL data warehouse.
Developed scalable REST APIs using Node.js to process campaign data and expose performance insights for marketing teams and brand partners.
Implemented React dashboards that visualize campaign performance, revenue attribution, and audience growth metrics for content creators and brands.

2122733055859e7f4a56b5b9a8fe6364.tech_stack: Python, AWS Lambda, SQS, MongoDB, REST APIs
description: Engineered a distributed event-driven system that automates publishing and scheduling of creator content across multiple social media platforms.

Built internal operational dashboards that allowed teams to monitor publishing pipelines, manage creator partnerships, and track engagement metrics.

Productionized machine learning features and models by building an end-to-end streaming architecture (Kafka, Spark). Managed data integrations and ensured data integrity for real-time alerting.

b48540c496f04ad7a9f62d9a508e04f2.tech_stack: Python, PyTorch, TensorRT, AWS Lambda, SQS, Video Processing
